overall.description: A cinematic forward-moving shot along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera glides steadily past calm reflective waters with the Night City skyline visible ahead, featuring hovering vehicles and neon signage. This is high-quality game engine footage showcasing modern glass architecture against a warm sunset sky.

events.description: camera dips slightly downward, bringing more water surface into view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the city skyline

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades against the horizon
large industrial building with green neon 'softsys' signage on the facade
flying vehicle hovering stationary over the water near the shore
concrete walkway edge along the water's edge
calm water surface reflecting the golden sky and city buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady forward movement along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The calm water reflects the warm golden hour sky and the distant glass skyline. A hovering aerial vehicle remains stationary on the left side over the water, while the 'softsys' building stands prominently on the right. Around the 12-second mark, the camera dips slightly, temporarily emphasizing the reflective water surface.

events.description: small aerial drone enters the frame from the right side of the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path while maintaining steady forward momentum

entered.detail: small flying drone or aircraft entering the sky from the right

segments.scene_description: The forward movement continues along the waterfront as the sun maintains its golden hour glow. A small aerial drone enters from the right side of the sky around 32 seconds and slowly traverses leftward across the frame. The city skyline, hovering vehicle, and reflective water remain constant, with the drone's movement adding dynamic motion to the otherwise serene cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward glide along a futuristic waterfront promenade that maintains a serene, golden-hour atmosphere as it approaches a glass skyline. It begins by moving past the prominent softsys building on the right and a stationary hovering vehicle over the calm, reflective water. As the camera continues its trajectory, it dips slightly to emphasize the shimmering surface of the water before leveling out again. The scene then expands as a small aerial drone enters from the right, traversing the warm sky to add dynamic motion to the cityscape. Finally, the camera maintains its constant forward momentum, keeping the glowing horizon and distant architecture centered in the frame.
